chief_complaint: A 62-year-old man presented with reduced consciousness and seizures.
history: A man with epilepsy presented with reduced consciousness and seizures following intentional ingestion of 8 g of lacosamide and 62.5 g of levetiracetam. He required tracheal intubation, mechanical ventilation, and intensive care management.
exam: Vital signs: not specified. Physical examination findings: not specified.
labs: ECG: initially normal (normal sinus rhythm), later developed QRS prolongations. CRRT initiated due to cardiotoxicity.
